text: est-ce que tu as besoin de travailler
speaker: TOM
notes: Question addressed to robot with marked prosody and leaning posture

speaker: ROB
notes: Repair initiator - robot failed to understand previous utterance

speaker: ROB
notes: Robot responds after 1.3s silence

speaker: TOM
notes: Acknowledgment token produced softly while shifting gaze toward ANA

speaker: TOM
notes: Aside sequence - produced softly for ANA, designed to remain inaudible to robot

text: au revoir bonne journée à toi
speaker: TOM
notes: Farewell greeting with marked prosody for robot - leans forward toward ROB

speaker: ROB
notes: Robot inquires about reason for closing - properly placed sequential response

text: oui désolé il faut que j'aille
speaker: TOM
translation: yes sorry I've got to go
notes: Agreement and apology with pointing gesture over shoulder

speaker: ANA
notes: Whispered aside - critical assessment designed to be heard only by TOM, syntactically addressed to robot

speaker: ROB
notes: Robot acknowledges TOM's explanation - does not respond to ANA's whispered aside

speaker: TOM
notes: Acknowledgment token repeated twice (lines 20 and 22)

speaker: TOM
notes: Final farewell with fist gesture matching robot's arm position

speaker: ROB
notes: Robot reciprocates farewell - interaction seems properly closed

speaker: TOM
notes: TOM reciprocates, turns toward ANA

speaker: ANA
translation: have a good day see you never
notes: Sarcastic whispered aside overlapping with robot's next turn

speaker: ROB
notes: Robot reopens closed conversation - repeats question from line 14, omnirelevance of speech

text: OUI OUI oui je je dois y aller
speaker: TOM
translation: YES YES yes I I have to go
notes: Emphatic repeated agreement with loud voice showing slight irritation

speaker: TOM
notes: Self-repair using same verb as robot (partir) to improve intelligibility

speaker: ROB
notes: Minimal acknowledgment before arm movement sequence

speaker: TOM
notes: Final farewell with brief waving gesture - effectively end of interaction for humans

speaker: ROB
notes: MISALIGNED RESPONSE: Robot initiates new interaction cycle after farewell - omnirelevance of speech

speaker: ANA
notes: Expression of exasperation, no longer orienting to robot's hearing threshold

text: j'ai exactement la même chose chez moi
speaker: ANA
translation: I have exactly the same thing at home
notes: Comment to TOM, no longer treating robot's hearing as relevant

speaker: ROB
notes: Repair initiator - robot responds to ANA's speech but is now ignored by humans

text: elle peut remplacer n'importe quelle autre carte pour t'aider à former une combinaison gagnante
speaker: VOA
translation: it can replace any other card to help you form a winning combination
notes: Voice agent explaining joker card function

text: oké alors maintenant explique-moi là là j'suis avec euh un un ami explique-moi qu'est-ce qu'on doit faire pour pour jouer
speaker: CED
translation: okay so now explain to me I am with a a friend explain to me what one should do to to play
notes: CED requests game instructions, establishes multiparty context

text: d'accord pour commencer chaque joueur reçoit un certain nombre de cartes
speaker: VOA
translation: ok to begin every player receives a certain number of cards
notes: Voice agent begins instruction, GUI starts distributing cards

speaker: CED
notes: Clarification request interrupting agent's turn

speaker: GUI
notes: MOUTHED + GESTURED: GUI responds with three-finger gesture and silent mouthing to avoid agent detection

text: vous essayez de former des combinaisons comme des suites ou des groupes de cartes de même valeur
speaker: VOA
translation: you try to form combinations like suites or groups of cards of the same value
notes: Agent continues without answering CED's question - no mechanism to detect GUI's gestured answer

text: y a combien d'ke attend attend attend doucement combien de cartes à chaque joueur
speaker: CED
translation: how many xx wait wait wait take it easy how many cards for each player
notes: CED interrupts and explicitly repeats question for voice agent

text: d'accord généralement chaque joueur commence avec dix cartes
speaker: VOA
translation: ok generally every player begins with ten cards
notes: Agent responds with TEN cards - contradicting GUI's 'three', no access to human-human interaction

speaker: ADR
notes: WHISPERED: ADR questions the number with rising intonation, soft voice to avoid agent

speaker: GUI
notes: MOUTHED + GESTURED: GUI repeats three-finger gesture and shakes head disagreeing with agent

text: vous pouvez ajuster selon vos préférences mais dix cartes est une bonne base pour débuter
speaker: VOA
translation: you can adjust as you wish but ten cards is a good way to start
notes: Agent continues with no reference to contradictory suggestion

text: d'accord mais voilà il préfère qu'on fasse à trois trois cartes
speaker: CED
translation: ok but he prefers that we do it with three three cards
notes: CED corrects agent, referring to GUI's preference

speaker: GUI
notes: WHISPERED: GUI confirms in overlap with CED

text: d'accord trois cartes chacun c'est parfait pour commencer
speaker: VOA
translation: ok three cards each it's perfect to start with
notes: Agent accepts correction with no acknowledgment of previous contradictory suggestion

speaker: ADR
notes: WHISPERED: Minimized laughter at agent's inconsistency

text: maintenant chacun essaye de former des combinaisons avec ses cartes le but est de se débarrasser de ses cartes en formant des suites ou des groupes
speaker: VOA
translation: now each tries to form combinations with their cards the goal is to get rid of one's cards by forming suites or groups
notes: Agent continues instruction

speaker: GUI
notes: WHISPERED: Acknowledgment with beat gesture, soft enough to avoid agent detection

speaker: ADR
notes: WHISPERED: Acknowledgment maintaining aside participation framework

speaker: CED
notes: WHISPERED: CED also produces soft acknowledgment

text: alors est-ce que est-ce que tu vois mon jeu
speaker: CED
translation: so do do you see my cards
notes: CED resumes loud voice to address agent, referring to camera capability
